author: thalikbussacro
description: Build graph view filters as structured include/exclude lines with autocomplete for tags, paths, and files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Thalik
manifest.description: Build graph view filters as structured include/exclude lines with autocomplete for tags, paths, and files.
manifest.name: Graph Filter Builder

name: Graph Filter Builder

releases.author: Thalikbussacro
releases.description:
First stable release prepared for Community Plugins submission.

Changes since 0.5.3:
- `minAppVersion` raised from 1.0.0 to 1.5.0
- `isDesktopOnly` set to `true` — the plugin depends on internal DOM of the graph view that isn't available on mobile
- Description rewritten in sentence case to comply with submission guidelines

Aggregated changes since 0.5.0 (BRAT users coming from earlier versions):
- `file:` autocomplete now includes non-markdown files (canvas, images, PDFs, etc.) and preserves the file extension in the inserted value
- Autocomplete popup layout fix: filename now always visible above the parent path
- Filter parser fix: terms are space-separated (implicit AND) instead of using explicit `AND`, which broke the graph filter when combined with negated terms

releases.author: Thalikbussacro
releases.description:
Bug fix.

- Separa termos do filtro por espaço (AND implícito) em vez de `AND` explícito. O parser do graph filter quebrava com `AND` quando combinado com termos negados (`-path:...`), causando comportamento errado no graph a partir da segunda linha.

Antes: `(path:foo) AND (-path:"bar")`
Depois: `(path:foo) (-path:"bar")`

releases.author: Thalikbussacro
releases.description:
Bug fix.

- Corrige renderização do autocomplete: o nome do arquivo (value) era escondido quando o path da pasta parent era longo. Itens agora empilham nome + path verticalmente, ambos sempre visíveis.

releases.author: Thalikbussacro
releases.description:
Bug fix.

- `file:` autocomplete agora oferece arquivos non-markdown (imagens, canvas, PDFs, etc.). Antes só listava `.md`, mesmo que o operador `file:` do Obsidian aceite qualquer arquivo do vault.
- Valor inserido pelo autocomplete agora inclui a extensão (`nota.canvas` em vez de `nota`) — evita match cruzado entre arquivos de mesmo basename.
- Correção menor: filtro do root no autocomplete `path:` (root do vault tem path vazio, não `/`).

releases.author: Thalikbussacro
releases.description:
Initial public release.

- Floating Filter Builder panel at top-left of the graph view
- Structured Include/Exclude lines for tag/path/file
- Autocomplete for tags, paths, and files
- Live updates to the native filter input
- Native graph bookmarks compatible
- Multiple graphs supported
